title: Bicomplex Mittag-Leffler Distribution
summary: Probability distribution theory helps in studying the impact of various dimensions in life while the Mittag-Leffler function and bicomplex are used in electromagnetism, quantum mechanics, and signal theory. Considering the importance of both, the purpose of this paper is to introduce bicomplex Mittag-Leffler distribution theory with the help of the bicomplex Mittag-Leffler function. Moreover, it also tells us about the moment-generating function, the first four moments, the mean, and the variance of this endeavor.
